signals.headline: Fed Chair Jerome Powell Confirms He Will Remain in Role as Chair Pro Tem Until Successor Confirmed, Even After May Term
signals.raw:
Fed Chair Jerome Powell Confirms He Will Remain in Role as Chair Pro Tem Until Successor Confirmed, Even After May Term End | NO | LOW confidence**  
Powell stated during a March 18, 2026, FOMC press conference that if his successor (Kevin Warsh, nominated by Trump) is not Senate-confirmed by his May 15 chair term end, he will serve as chair pro tem per federal law precedent.[1][2][3][4]  
He also
matched_markets: Will Trump agree to Iranian enrichment of uranium in April?
Will Powell say "Successor" during April press conference?
